title: The Babbler Of Art.
content:
Dost thou desire the good in art? Of the good art thou worthy,
    Which by a ne'er ceasing war 'gainst thee thyself is produced?
meaning:
Friedrich Schiller's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "The Babbler Of Art."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
